examples: There the colonists grew crops and extracted products for their own use and for transshipment back to their high-altitude compatriots.
If transshipment is allowed, the port of transshipment is marked.
The L/C must specify that transshipment and partial shipments are allowed.
Tourism, petroleum transshipment, and offshore finance are the mainstays of this small economy, which is closely tied to the outside world.
Containerisation has also boosted Panama's use as a transshipment point.
